channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Stretching comms to the limit in the wake of a natural disaster
item.description: The effects of a brutal storm that hit the eastern Spanish peninsula in late October were felt beyond the affected areas. Videos shared on social media and calls to television and radio programs showed the magnitude of the rain and flooding in Valencia, Albacete, and other towns in the area.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Python 3.14 is a rational constant
item.description: This (half-) month in Python and elsewhere: Get your feet wet with Pi-thon, er, Python 3.14, in its alpha 2 release! See how standalone Python app executables work with PyInstaller. Use Python’s pattern matching to unlock type-based decision-making superpowers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Canada sues Google over alleged anticompetitive practices in online ads
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Canada's antitrust watchdog said Thursday it is suing Google over alleged anticompetitive conduct in the tech giant’s online advertising business and wants the company to sell off two of its ad tech services and pay a penalty.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Uber branches out into AI data labeling
item.description: Uber no longer offers just rides and deliveries: It’s created a new division hiring out gig workers to help enterprises with some of their AI model development work.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Paso adelante en el desarrollo de los modelos virtuales de las presas de la Confederación Hidrográfica del Guadiana
item.description: La Secretaría de Estado de Medioambiente ha adjudicado a la UTE conformada por Sener y Medical el lote número seis del contrato para la Implementación de Metodología BIM.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How to use ref structs in C# 13
item.description: In the C# programming language, structs or structure types are value types that allow faster access because they are usually stored in the stack.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 10+ tips and services for new Bluesky users
item.description: For the past two or three weeks, upstart social network Bluesky has been attracting large numbers of new users every day, a crowd that quite evidently includes many Apple device users — the app has at times topped Apple’s App Store charts in the run-up to Thanksgiving in the US.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Australia's social media ban for kids is closer to becoming law
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia’s House of Representatives on Wednesday passed a bill that would ban children younger than 16 years old from social media, leaving it to the Senate to finalize the world-first law.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Kotlin for Java developers: Concurrency with coroutines
item.description: The ability to perform multiple operations simultaneously is one of the most important aspects of any programming language. Orchestrating multiple paths of execution is inherently complex and there are various approaches to taming this complexity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Interpol clamps down on cybercrime and arrests over 1,000 suspects in Africa
item.description: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) — Interpol arrested 1,006 suspects in Africa during a massive two-month operation, clamping down on cybercrime that left tens of thousands of victims, including some who were trafficked, and produced millions in financial damages, the global police organization said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MARK BANCHEREAU, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Dell adds to PowerEdge server lineup
item.description: Dell Technologies introduced new hardware products and services at two separate conferences, the Supercomputing 24 show in Atlanta and Microsoft’s Ignite conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 3 data engineering trends riding Kafka, Flink, and Iceberg
item.description: Apache Kafka, Apache Flink, and Apache Iceberg are among the most popular technologies in the data ecosystem.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: GitHub Copilot: Everything you need to know
item.description: In 2014, Microsoft Research released an experimental Bing Code Search add-on for Visual Studio and the web. It was a code snippet search tool for C# with a natural language interface, using an index of code from Stack Overflow, MSDN, Dotnetperls, and CSharp411, powered by Bing, running on Azure.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Cheap Black Friday deals cost to your privacy
item.description: As Black Friday approaches, you should know that retailers often sell consumers' personal information and purchase histories to third parties.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Mr. Miyagi's dramatic return
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
